prestazioni: Replace the stock 340ci (6.2L) LA-series V8 (engine code: A340) with a forged rotating assembly from Eagle Specialty Products, featuring a 4.125" stroker crank, H-beam connecting rods (6.123" length), and forged aluminum pistons (10.5:1 compression) to handle 700+ HP reliably under boost.

Install a custom-built centrifugal supercharger system using a Vortech V-3 Si-Trim (8psi base) with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold (designed by Holley for the AAR's unique plenum spacing) and a dual-core intercooler from Bell Intercoolers (3.5" thick, 22" x 14" core) to eliminate heat soak in Trans-Am racing conditions.

Upgrade the valvetrain with a COMP Cams Xtreme Energy 292H camshaft (248°/254° duration, .540"/.562" lift, 110° LSA) paired with COMP Cams roller rockers (1.6:1 ratio), titanium retainers, and PAC Racing valve springs (180 lbs seat pressure) to support 7,500 RPM redline while maintaining street drivability.
estetica: Replace the factory fiberglass hood with a carbon fiber replica from AAR-specific specialist Muscle Car Restorations, featuring a functional 3" cowl induction scoop and hidden hood pins from Billet Specialties (Vintage Series).

Install a full-width rear spoiler from the original AAR homologation kit (part #P3690245), reinforced with a custom aluminum substructure by Detroit Speed to prevent flex at high speeds, and paint-matched in "Sublime Green" with black vinyl accents.

Swap the stock steel wheels for a set of 17x9" and 17x12" front/rear American Racing Torq-Thrust II wheels (ET +12/+0 offset) wrapped in Mickey Thompson ET Street R tires (275/40R17 front, 335/35R17 rear) for maximum drag radial performance, paired with Baer 6P calipers and 13" rotors for consistent stopping power.
